items.title: Nvidia Earnings On Deck, SMCI Regains Compliance: What's Driving Markets Wednesday?
items.author: Erica Kollmann
items.description: Nvidia shares lead the tech sector higher as investors anticipate the company's quarterly earnings release. Shares of Super Micro Computer soar after the company submitted its long-delayed financial reports ahead of a Nasdaq-imposed deadline.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Nvidia shares are leading the tech sector higher as investors anticipate the company's quarterly earnings release, indicating positive market sentiment.
Shares of Super Micro Computer soar after the company submitted its long-delayed financial reports, regaining compliance with Nasdaq, suggesting positive investor sentiment.
The S&P 500 index is mentioned as a broad market indicator, without any specific sentiment expressed.
The article mentions the performance of the TLT ETF, which tracks long-term Treasury bonds, without expressing any specific sentiment.
